content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative self-improvement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid 'multi-view self-refinement' pipeline, where each iteration of self-feedback draws on conflicting perspectives to surface blind spots a single self-feedback loop would miss. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional supervised training or external data while addressing its key limitation of getting stuck in local optima from homogeneous self-feedback.
